frame_analyses.description: Welcome slide for SAGES 2022 FLS 2.0 presentation by Dr. Neal Seymour
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational presentation about upcoming changes to FLS testing

frame_analyses.description: Review of technical skills relevant to FLS testing - evolution since FLS inception
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Discussion of competency expectations and need for updated technical skills test

frame_analyses.description: Working group definition of essential technical skills - SMEs from 12 North American institutions
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Nominal group technique for competency identification

frame_analyses.description: Five competency domains listed: Setup, Abdominal access, Laparoscope use, Tissue management, Managing operative environment
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Comprehensive framework for laparoscopic surgery competencies

frame_analyses.description: Detailed list of 65 specific competencies across all domains
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Granular breakdown of essential laparoscopic skills

frame_analyses.description: Survey with 65 items, anchored rating scale for importance/frequency/priority, 2336 participants
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Large-scale validation study with diverse surgical specialties

demonstrated_techniques: systematic competency identification using nominal group technique
evidence-based survey methodology for skill prioritization
correlation analysis between importance, frequency, and testing priority
verbal_cues: Focus on priority for testing based on correlation analysis
Competencies reaching 50th percentile identified as essential
common_errors_addressed: avoiding outdated skill requirements that don't reflect current practice
ensuring test validity through large-scale professional input
balancing skill importance with practical testing constraints

confidence_rationale: Clear instructional content with systematic presentation of FLS 2.0 development methodology. No actual task performance to score - this is educational material about FLS program evolution.
cannot_determine: No FLS task performance visible - this is a lecture presentation
technique_summary: Educational presentation detailing the evidence-based development of FLS 2.0 competency framework through systematic expert input and large-scale survey validation.
